'''ây-w-b-v''' ('''kayawbevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:valet|valet]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-w-b-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:valet|valet]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-w-b-v
|-
! Lemma
| kayawbevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==

''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
